creator: gblach@FreeBSD.org
text:
This patch doesn't update pkg-plist file.


====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/lib/ecore/system/upower/v-1.20/module.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libunwind-x86_64.so.8 from devel/libunwind but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libunwind-x86_64.so:devel/libunwind
Error: /usr/local/lib/ecore/system/upower/v-1.20/module.so is linked to /usr/local/lib/libunwind.so.8 from devel/libunwind but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libunwind.so:devel/libunwind
